name: checkbox
label: Checkbox
description: An accessible checkbox with label, description, custom icon, and clickable-card layouts. Works with wire:model.

props.name: label
props.description: Label text shown next to the checkbox.

props.name: description
props.description: Secondary helper text under the label.

props.name: clickable
props.description: Make the whole row a single click target.

props.name: icon
props.description: An optional component name to use instead of the default checkmark.

props.name: hideCheckbox
props.description: Hide the visual box (useful for custom toggles).
